names.significance: Vishnu is the universe itself — everything that exists is a manifestation of Him.
His very name denotes omnipresence — He enters and permeates all of creation.

names.meaning_en: The one invoked through Vedic sacrificial chants
names.meaning_hi: यज्ञ में वषट्कार मन्त्र द्वारा आह्वानित
names.significance: He is the essence of all Vedic rituals and the ultimate recipient of every offering.

names.meaning_en: Lord of past, present and future
names.meaning_hi: भूत, भविष्य और वर्तमान के स्वामी
names.significance: He transcends time — master of all that was, is, and ever will be.
He brings forth all living beings through His divine will.

names.meaning_hi: सभी प्राणियों का भरण-पोषण करने वाले
names.significance: He nourishes and sustains every creature without exception.
He is existence in its purest form — the being behind all becoming.
He dwells as the innermost Self in every living being.
Beyond the individual self, He is the ultimate cosmic consciousness.

names.meaning_en: The supreme goal of the liberated
names.significance: For those who attain liberation, He is the final and highest destination.
He governs the entire cosmos with absolute sovereignty.

names.meaning_hi: अपनी इच्छा से प्रकट होने वाले
names.significance: He incarnates in various forms whenever dharma needs to be restored.

names.meaning_en: Son of Aditi, the radiant one
names.significance: He shines like the sun, illuminating the world with divine radiance.
His eyes are beautiful like lotuses, gazing upon all beings with compassion.
He is the source of the primordial sound Oṃ that reverberates through creation.

names.meaning_hi: जिनका न आदि है न अन्त
names.significance: He is eternal — beyond the cycle of birth and death.
He supports and upholds the entire framework of creation.
He ordains the laws of the cosmos and the destiny of all beings.
He annihilates all evil and suffering to protect the righteous.
He remains changeless amidst the ever-changing world.

names.meaning_hi: श्याम वर्ण, सबको आकर्षित करने वाले
names.significance: As Kṛṣṇa, He draws every heart toward the divine through irresistible love.
His reddish eyes signify both fierce protection of devotees and boundless compassion.
He destroys the inner enemies — desire, anger, and greed — in the hearts of seekers.

names.meaning_en: The refuge of all beings, dwelling in the cosmic waters
names.meaning_hi: सबके आश्रय, जल में निवास करने वाले
names.significance: He is the ultimate shelter — the one in whom all beings find their final resting place.
He is the eternal being from whom all individual souls originate.

names.meaning_en: The remover of sins and sorrows
names.meaning_hi: पापों और दुःखों को हरने वाले
names.significance: Simply chanting His name 'Hari' removes accumulated sins and suffering.
He embodies divine valor and courage as the scion of a heroic lineage.

names.meaning_en: One who is worshipped by all people
names.significance: All beings instinctively turn to Him in their moments of deepest need.
He has no boundaries in space, time, or attributes — He is truly infinite.

names.meaning_en: One who was bound around the waist by Yaśodā
names.meaning_hi: जिन्हें यशोदा ने उदर में रस्सी से बाँधा
names.significance: The infinite Lord allows Himself to be bound by the ropes of pure love.
He is the supreme form of Viṣṇu from whom all universes emanate.

names.meaning_en: Protector of cows, knower of all senses
names.meaning_hi: गौओं के रक्षक, इन्द्रियों के ज्ञाता
names.significance: He protects all life and is known through the Vedas and through direct experience.

names.meaning_en: Consort of Lakṣmī, lord of knowledge
names.significance: He is the lord of both spiritual wisdom and material abundance.

names.meaning_hi: मधु दैत्य का संहार करने वाले
names.significance: He destroys the demon of ignorance just as He slew the demon Madhu.

names.meaning_en: One who conquered the three worlds in three strides
names.meaning_hi: तीन पगों से तीनों लोक नापने वाले
names.significance: As Vāmana, He measured the entire universe — nothing is beyond His reach.
He teaches that true greatness lies not in physical stature but in divine intent.

names.meaning_en: Bearer of Lakṣmī (the goddess of fortune)
names.significance: All prosperity and grace reside eternally upon His chest.
He is the master of all senses and guides them toward higher purpose.

names.meaning_en: One from whose navel springs the cosmic lotus
names.meaning_hi: जिनकी नाभि से ब्रह्मा का कमल उत्पन्न हुआ
names.significance: From His navel-lotus, the creator Brahmā emerged — He is the source of creation.

names.meaning_en: Son of Vasudeva, the indwelling Lord
names.meaning_hi: वसुदेव के पुत्र, सबमें निवास करने वाले
names.significance: He dwells in all beings — 'Vāsudevaḥ sarvam iti' — Vāsudeva is everything.

names.meaning_en: One who draws all beings toward Himself
names.meaning_hi: सबको अपनी ओर आकर्षित करने वाले
names.significance: He draws all souls back to the divine source at the time of cosmic dissolution.

names.meaning_en: One of supreme radiance and power
names.significance: His brilliance illuminates all worlds and dispels the darkness of ignorance.
No force in the universe can hinder His will or His grace.

names.meaning_en: The Supreme Person, the best among all beings
names.significance: He transcends both the perishable and imperishable — the highest reality.

names.meaning_en: One who is beyond sense perception
names.significance: He cannot be perceived by ordinary senses — only through devotion and grace.

names.meaning_en: One with the form of Narasimha (man-lion)
names.significance: He assumed the half-man, half-lion form to protect His child-devotee Prahlāda.

names.meaning_en: The possessor of all glory and beauty
names.significance: All beauty, wealth, and auspiciousness are eternally present in Him.

names.meaning_en: One with beautiful hair, lord of Brahmā and Śiva
names.meaning_hi: सुन्दर केशों वाले, ब्रह्मा और शिव के स्वामी
names.significance: He is the supreme lord from whom even Brahmā (Ka) and Śiva (Īśa) originate.

names.meaning_en: The infallible one who never falls
names.significance: He never wavers from His nature, His promises, or His devotees.
He is truth itself — the unchanging reality behind all appearances.

names.meaning_en: One who is attained through yoga
names.significance: He is both the path and the goal of all yogic practice.

names.meaning_en: The guide of those who know yoga
names.significance: He leads the greatest yogis toward the supreme realization.
He is the ultimate source and the perfect knower of all Vedic wisdom.

names.meaning_hi: अविनाशी, जिनका कभी क्षय नहीं होता
names.significance: While everything in the material world perishes, He remains unchanged forever.

names.meaning_en: The cosmic being, the Supreme Person
names.significance: He pervades the entire universe as the primordial cosmic being of the Puruṣa Sūkta.
Every breath drawn by every creature is sustained by His power.
He is Oṃ — the primordial sound from which all creation emerges.
There is nothing that exists apart from Him — He is the totality.

names.meaning_en: The auspicious one, destroyer of suffering
names.meaning_hi: मंगलकारी, दुःखों का नाश करने वाले
names.significance: He destroys all forms of suffering for those who surrender to Him.
He is the supreme sovereign over all worlds, all beings, and all deities.
He knows the thoughts, actions, and destiny of every being in creation.
He rules the entire cosmos with perfect wisdom and infinite compassion.

names.meaning_en: One than whom there is none greater
names.significance: He stands supreme — no being or principle surpasses Him.
He is the greatest master of yoga — in perfect union with all of reality.
His strength is infinite — He effortlessly upholds the entire universe.
His wisdom is boundless and forms the foundation of all knowledge.
His divine splendor outshines all luminaries — the sun and stars glow by His light.
He is not created by anyone — He manifests by His own divine will.
He bestows peace, joy, and auspiciousness upon all who remember Him.
Even the greatest celestial beings bow before Him as their supreme lord.
His discus symbolizes the cosmic wheel of time and the power to destroy adharma.

names.meaning_en: Bearer of the divine mace Kaumodakī
names.significance: His mace represents the power of knowledge that crushes ignorance.
His bow represents the cosmic principle of destruction and dissolution.
His sword represents the cutting edge of supreme knowledge that severs bondage.

names.meaning_en: Bearer of the divine conch Pāñcajanya
names.significance: His conch heralds the triumph of dharma and awakens souls from spiritual slumber.

names.meaning_en: The source of the life-giving nectar
names.significance: He is the origin of immortality — granting eternal life to those who seek Him.
His four arms represent dharma, artha, kāma, and mokṣa — the four goals of life.

names.meaning_en: One whose vision is beautiful and auspicious
names.meaning_hi: जिनका दर्शन शुभ और सुन्दर है
names.significance: Just beholding His divine form liberates the soul from worldly entanglements.

names.meaning_en: The younger brother of Indra (as Vāmana)
names.significance: Though appearing as Indra's younger brother, He is the supreme Lord of all devas.

names.meaning_en: The one who delights, Lord Rāma
names.significance: As Rāma, He exemplifies the ideal of righteous conduct and perfect devotion.

names.meaning_en: The possessor of all six divine opulences
names.significance: He possesses all wealth, strength, fame, beauty, knowledge, and renunciation in full.
He is the light of consciousness that illuminates every mind and every world.

names.meaning_en: One whose form is the entire universe
names.significance: As shown to Arjuna, His cosmic form contains all worlds, all beings, all time.

names.meaning_en: The immortal, the nectar of existence
names.significance: He is deathless and grants immortality to those who take refuge in Him.
There is no place, no being, and no moment where He is not present.
Nothing is hidden from His gaze — He witnesses every act and every thought.
He shines with the light of omniscience, knowing all and illuminating all.
He oversees and ensures the cosmic order of righteousness is maintained.
He has no origin — He exists eternally beyond the cycle of birth.
He incarnated as sage Kapila to teach Sāṅkhya philosophy and liberate His mother Devahūti.

names.meaning_en: The seasons, the rhythm of time
names.significance: He manifests as the cyclical rhythm of seasons, sustaining life on earth.

names.meaning_hi: जिनका दर्शन अति सुन्दर और शुभ है
names.significance: His divine vision grants liberation — to see Him is to be transformed.

names.meaning_hi: सभी दिव्य अस्त्र-शस्त्र धारण करने वाले
names.significance: He wields every weapon needed to protect dharma and destroy adharma.
He is the eternal consort of the goddess of wealth, grace, and abundance.

names.meaning_en: One who bears the Śrīvatsa mark on His chest
names.meaning_hi: जिनके वक्षस्थल पर श्रीवत्स चिह्न है
names.significance: The Śrīvatsa on His chest signifies that Lakṣmī forever resides upon His heart.
All prosperity and divine grace find their eternal home in Him.

names.meaning_en: Lord of Vaikuṇṭha, the supreme abode
names.significance: He presides over the spiritual realm where there is no sorrow or bondage.
His lotus-like eyes radiate infinite compassion upon every being in creation.

names.meaning_en: The supreme one who transcends all
names.significance: He surpasses all limitations and is the ultimate answer to every spiritual quest.

names.meaning_hi: सब दोषों का क्षय करने वाले
names.significance: He burns away the impurities of the heart, purifying devotees completely.
He embodies and resides in the purest mode of goodness — beyond all taint.
His vow to protect those who surrender to Him never wavers.

names.meaning_en: One with a beautiful, radiant face
names.significance: His face radiates grace and delight, comforting all who behold Him.

names.meaning_en: The true friend of all beings
names.significance: He is the selfless well-wisher residing in every heart as the dearest friend.
He recognizes and rewards even the smallest act of dharma performed sincerely.
He perfectly knows the righteous path for every being in every situation.

names.meaning_en: One for whom everything becomes a weapon
names.meaning_hi: जिनके लिये सब कुछ आयुध बन जाता है
names.significance: He can use anything in creation as His instrument — nothing limits His protective power.

names.meaning_en: Om, I bow to the divine Lord Vāsudeva
names.significance: This supreme twelve-syllable mantra encompasses the entire Sahasranāma — salutation to the Lord who dwells in all.
